message:
test(fcp-core): add provenance verification tests (uek4)

Add comprehensive unit tests for ApprovalToken and taint handling:
- SanitizerReceipt verification tests (5 tests)
  - covers_input validation
  - can_clear authorization checks
  - is_valid cleared-subset-of-authorized invariant
  - empty cleared_flags edge case
  - attack scenario: forged receipt clearing unauthorized flags
- Cross-Zone operations tests (6 tests)
  - Zone crossing tracking
  - Unapproved zone crossing taint accumulation
  - Flow check: public to work requires elevation (Biba model)
  - Flow check: private to public requires declassification
  - Flow check: work to owner requires elevation
  - Flow check: owner to public requires both
  - Flow check: untrusted to owner requires elevation
- ExecutionScope tests (3 tests)
  - Serialization roundtrip
  - ApprovalToken zone binding
  - InputConstraint JSON pointer format

All tests follow FCP2 structured logging format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
